home.subtitle: Experience luxury redefined at Saint Fire Chios. Where the Mediterranean meets modern elegance.

restaurant.title: Fine Dining
restaurant.subtitle: Culinary Excellence
restaurant.description: Experience Mediterranean cuisine reimagined at Saint Fire Chios. Our expert chefs craft each dish with precision, using the finest local ingredients and modern techniques to create unforgettable dining experiences.

greek_salad.title: Greek Salad
greek_salad.description: Fresh Mediterranean vegetables, Kalamata olives, and local feta cheese

chicken_sandwich.title: Crispy Chicken Sandwich
chicken_sandwich.description: House-made brioche, crispy chicken, and signature sauce

burger.title: Saint Fire Burger
burger.description: Premium beef patty with aged cheddar and truffle aioli

beach_club.title: Beach Club
beach_club.subtitle: Your Private Paradise
beach_club.description: Experience the ultimate beach luxury at Saint Fire Beach Club. With 75 exclusive umbrella sets arranged in perfect harmony along our pristine beach, each spot offers an unparalleled view of the Aegean Sea.

seating.title: Premium Seating
seating.description: Luxurious sunbeds and umbrellas arranged in 5 rows of 15, ensuring perfect views and privacy

service.title: Beach Service
service.description: Dedicated attendants serving refreshing cocktails and light meals directly to your sunbed

activities.title: Water Sports
activities.description: Access to various water activities and equipment rentals for adventure seekers

bar.title: Bar & Nightlife
bar.subtitle: Ignite Your Night
bar.description: As the sun sets, Saint Fire transforms into the island's most exclusive nightlife destination. Experience craft cocktails, world-class DJs, and an atmosphere that captures the essence of Mediterranean nights.

mediterranean_fire.title: Mediterranean Fire
mediterranean_fire.description: Premium tequila, fresh lime, blood orange, and a spicy kick

aegean_sunset.title: Aegean Sunset
aegean_sunset.description: Local gin, cucumber, mint, and Mediterranean tonic

golden_hour.title: Golden Hour
golden_hour.description: Aged rum, passion fruit, vanilla, and champagne float

hotel.title: Luxury Stays
hotel.subtitle: Experience Pure Luxury
hotel.description: Immerse yourself in the epitome of Mediterranean luxury at Saint Fire Hotel. Each room offers stunning sea views, premium amenities, and unparalleled comfort for an unforgettable stay in Chios.

deluxe.title: Deluxe Sea View
deluxe.description: Spacious room with private balcony and sea views

executive.title: Executive Suite
executive.description: Luxury suite with separate living area and premium amenities

presidential.title: Presidential Suite
presidential.description: Ultimate luxury with panoramic views and private terrace

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.pdf_subtitle: Choose a menu to view or download

menu.subtitle: SAINT FIRE – SEA SIDE RESTO BAR
menu.dietary_info: V - Vegetarian | VG - Vegan | GF - Gluten Free

form.no_times: No available time slots for the selected date and party size

cancel_modal.title: Cancel Reservation
cancel_modal.message: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?
cancel_modal.warning: This action cannot be undone. The guest will need to make a new reservation if they wish to dine with us.
